title: Checkout 500s after deploy
summary: Spike caused by auth token rotation timing out under load.
details: Requests piled up after a deploy changed refresh timing, which caused token expiry and a retry storm.

title: Webhook fanout failure
summary: Downstream retries amplified a stale credential refresh bug.
details: A stale refresh token and an aggressive retry loop created a burst of duplicate deliveries.

title: Session invalidation loop
summary: Repeated login failures traced to a missing backoff guard.
details: Login attempts retried immediately after invalidation, which kept creating fresh failures instead of recovering.

title: API rate limit cascade
summary: A burst of upstream retries exhausted the shared rate limit pool.
details: One noisy caller saturated the limiter, causing unrelated requests to fail until the window reset.
